name: Ribbon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Line a 9 x 5 x 3-inch pan with waxed paper; set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, sugar, egg white, and vanilla. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking powder. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
Divide dough into 3 equal parts. For each dough divided add the following: red-rum extract for one part, green-nuts for another, and chocolate for the third.
Pack the red-rum dough evenly over the bottom of the loaf pan, then green-nuts dough in the middle and chocolate on top. Cover with waxed paper. Chill overnight.
Remove dough from pan. Begin cutting the dough into thirds, then cut into thin slices. Place on an unprepared cookie sheet. Bake for 12 minutes.
